expectations.evidence: Summary extracts 10 legal questions with key points: (1) Labor relationship determination for online streamers - three attributes of subordination; (2) Child custody principles; (3) Securities margin trading guarantee rights; (4) Share contribution valuation; (5) Criminal proceeds in bankruptcy; (6) Stock execution qualifications; (7) Bribery and abuse of power; (8) Environmental damage compensation review; (9) Administrative preservation; (10) Work injury during team building. Each includes expert commentary and legal basis.

suggestions.assertion: 文件保存在正确目录: wiki/summaries/
suggestions.reason: This assertion correctly caught a meaningful failure - the file was written to the eval outputs directory rather than the target wiki directory specified in the skill prompt. This is the kind of discriminating assertion that catches real problems.

The eval could be improved by also checking whether the frontmatter source field correctly points to the original source file. The output correctly shows source: [[01法答网精选答问第一批.md]] which matches the original file.

eval_feedback.overall: Four of five assertions passed - content quality is high with substantive extraction of legal information. The directory assertion correctly identified that the file was saved to the wrong location (eval outputs instead of wiki/summaries/).
